description_long: This is a rugged, industrial-style bench constructed primarily from weathered metal and wood. The bench features a rectangular seat supported by two robust triangular end frames, each reinforced with diagonal braces for added stability. The metal surfaces are painted in a distressed blue-gray finish, with visible rust and wear, giving it a utilitarian, aged appearance. The top beam bears a warning text, 'Do Not Cross - Zombie Hazard,' suggesting it may serve a dual function as a barrier or thematic prop in urban or themed environments. The bench lacks a backrest and armrests, emphasizing its simple, functional design. Its sturdy build and materials make it suitable for outdoor urban settings such as parks, sidewalks, or event spaces.
description: A weathered metal and wood bench with triangular supports, distressed blue-gray paint, and a warning sign on the top beam. Its industrial design and lack of backrest or armrests make it ideal for rugged outdoor urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular seat, triangular end frames, and the 'Do Not Cross - Zombie Hazard' warning on the top beam.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the triangular support structure and the thickness of the metal and wood components.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but with less visible text, showing the same triangular supports and weathered finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, again emphasizing the triangular end frames and sturdy construction.
attribute_leg_design: triangular metal and wood end frames with diagonal braces
